manifest.description: Ultra-optimized inference engine for Apple Silicon (M1/M2/M3/M4) using MLX. Includes real prefix matching with instant TTFT in long conversations.

metadata.description: Ultra-optimized inference engine for Apple Silicon (MLX)

generate.cache_saved: MLXChatNode: Option D saved clean cache ({prompt_tokens} tokens → {total_tokens} with response)

config.model_path_empty: MLXConfig: model_path is empty. Configure NEXE_MLX_MODEL or pass model_path.
config.loaded: MLXConfig loaded: model={model}, max_tokens={max_tokens}, max_kv_size={max_kv_size}, temp={temperature:.1f}, top_p={top_p:.1f}, max_caches={max_caches}
config.model_path_not_dir: MLXConfig: model_path must be a directory: {path}
config.config_json_missing: MLXConfig: model_path does not contain config.json: {path}
config.top_p_range: MLXConfig: top_p must be between 0 and 1

logs.cache_saved_prefill: MLXChatNode: cache saved post-prefill ({tokens} tokens, key={key})
logs.chatnode_identity: MLXChatNode: identity={identity}, full={full}, cached={cached}, new={new}, prefix_reuse={reuse}
logs.chatnode_prefix_stats: MLXChatNode: prefix={prefix} (cached={cached}, new={new}), prefill={prompt_tps:.1f} tok/s, gen={gen_tps:.1f} tok/s, {elapsed_ms}ms (p:{prefill_ms} g:{generation_ms}), {peak_memory_mb:.0f} MB
logs.config_invalid_hint: Expected: NEXE_MLX_MODEL should point to a valid MLX model directory
logs.exact_match_processing_bos: MLXChatNode: exact match, processing BOS token (~10ms overhead)
logs.generator_empty: MLXChatNode: generator empty, no prefill cache saved
logs.merged_response_with_cache: MLXChatNode: merged response with last assistant (cache)
logs.metal_unavailable: MLXModule: Metal is not available. Cannot initialize MLX.
logs.metal_unavailable_hint: To use MLX: Ensure you're running on Apple Silicon with Metal support
logs.model_reset: MLXChatNode: model and all caches reset
logs.prefix_match_processing: MLXChatNode: prefix match, processing {count} new tokens (with memory)
